name: com.likeon.narrative
description: Single-player narrative core for Unity: branching dialogue, a state-machine quest system, and save/load. Reuses the Sigil GameplayTag system (com.likeon.gas). A C# reimplementation of the design of Narrative Pro / Narrative Arsenal (design by Narrative Tools), rewritten for Unity. Combat (GAS), networking, AI, character creator and graph editors are intentionally out of scope.
